steps.name: loadtest-infra
steps.summary: loadtest/ 디렉토리 + lib/(auth, setup, config) + smoke.js(10VU 30s) + README + .gitignore 갱신 + .gitkeep + k6 archive 검증 통과

steps.name: scenarios
steps.summary: 4개 시나리오 작성 - seat-contention(1000VU 정확성)·distributed(ramping 1000VU throughput)·payment-flow(100VU 2m e2e)·queue-burst(5000VU). k6 archive 4개 모두 통과
